_meta.websockets: None found. No Ratchet, ReactPHP, or WebSocket server in vendor or composer.json.

product.notes: ProductInterface object with sku, name, price, attribute_set_id, status, visibility, type_id

endpoints._notes: Returns plain quoted string — the cartId

cartItem.notes: CartItemInterface; quote_id is auto-filled from token

addressInformation.notes: ShippingInformationInterface with shipping_address, billing_address, shipping_carrier_code, shipping_method_code

entity.notes: ShipmentTrackInterface with order_id, carrier_code, title, track_number

review.notes: ReviewInterface with title, detail, nickname, entity_pk_value (product_id)

input.notes: Optional; include cart_id to use specific ID

items.notes: Array of customer records to inline-edit
